_README: DDB characterIds for The Breakfast Club (Pacts & Power). Taken from the Campaign Dashboard roster. The campaign is COMPLETE (ended 2026-05-31), so this is a one-time archive of the party's final sheets — there's no watcher to auto-refresh it. Output files are named after the real character name from each fetched sheet, so this registry only needs IDs. Sheets are likely Campaign-Only; add DDB_COBALT to .env to fetch them. Lance has no characterId on record (left the campaign).
